# Jonathan DeLaigle — grndlvl

> Jonathan DeLaigle (online: grndlvl) is an applied AI architect, CTO, and software engineer with 18+ years of experience. He designs agentic AI systems, integrates AI into real business workflows, and ships production software. He also runs grndlvl Launch, a focused service building fast, accessible, mobile-first launch pages for small businesses.

## About
- [Home / portfolio](https://www.grndlvl.com/): Applied AI architecture, agentic systems, workflow integration, and production engineering.
- Currently CTO at Zivtech, leading a company-wide AI-first practice.
- 18+ years delivering for organizations including Children's Hospital of Philadelphia, Johns Hopkins, Merck, LSAC, GroScale, and NCLC.

## Services
- [grndlvl Launch](https://www.grndlvl.com/launch): Enterprise-grade engineering at small-business scale — fast, accessible, mobile-first launch pages for local businesses, clubs, and community organizations in Augusta, the CSRA, and remotely. Flexible pilot pricing, with room to grow into booking, payments, CRM, and automation.
- AI & product consulting: agentic systems, AI workflow automation, human-in-the-loop systems, and early-stage technical direction.

## Expertise
- Applied AI: agentic system design, multi-agent orchestration, workflow integration, and production guardrails (observability, evaluation, permissions, human-in-the-loop).
- Engineering: full-stack (Next.js, React), Drupal, APIs and integrations, DevOps, and high-scale platforms.
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.2 AA, with automated and agent-assisted testing.

## Selected work
- AI-assisted accessibility assurance harness (Zivtech, applied on the NCLC platform).
- Zivtech company-wide AI-first practice (research, engineering, review, QA, docs).
- GroScale — high-throughput shipping platform scaled from 10,000 to 500,000+ packages/month.
- NCLC Digital Library — Drupal 7 to Drupal 10 modernization with a React reader and Solr search.
- Backyard Bullies Wrestling Club — community launch build ([site](https://www.backyardbullies-wc.com/)).
- Hall's Balls & Exotics — pilot launch build.
